default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Daily standup to discuss Atlas improvements, workflow issues, and client-specific challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=95.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Atlas improvements: Working on specific guidance for content structure and fixing AI Assist tool bugs](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [External linking issues being addressed; internal linking improvements coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [New publisher hired to automate publishing steps for all pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=781.0)
  - [SEO best practices sometimes override narrative quality; underlying prompts being reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)

## Topics

### Atlas Improvements and Bug Fixes

  - [Developing solutions for specific guidance on content structure, including article archetypes (lists, how-tos, guides)](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [AI Assist tool bugs (page jumping, bullet point handling) being fixed](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [External linking not working; issue flagged and being addressed](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Internal linking flow improvements coming to increase link quantity](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Workflow Customization for Tiro Account

  - [Issue: Statistics appearing in introductions despite instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Solution: Create bespoke workflow with separate polishing step for introductions](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Future improvement: Automated publishing step for staging in Framer CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### SEO and Indexing Challenges

  - [Abnormal account: Keywords linking to careers page by default; likely a sitemap issue](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Exec Rights: Articles not being indexed; some sections returning internal server errors](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Importance of flagging SEO issues in internal channels and tagging relevant team members](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)

### Atlas Future Development

  - [Content library integration to replace Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)
  - [Content quality ratings and adherence to instructions](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Dashboard for content performance and quality metrics](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)

## Next Steps

  - [File ticket for Tiro workflow customization (separate intro polishing step)](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Flag Abnormal linking issue in ticket; consider SEO audit](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Usman to post Exec Rights indexing issues in internal channel, tagging relevant team members](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1308.0)
  - [Matthew to schedule next round of one-on-ones for August](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Team members encouraged to use Learning Atlas for async issue reporting](https://fathom.video/share/ShaQSx1LWT4B4nqcx2uXtf_2MZad_kGw?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

action_items.description: File ticket for new workflow step to remove stats/links from Tiro intros, reflow, insert between article gen & fact-checking
File ticket re Abnormal keyword links defaulting to careers page. Post issue in Abnormal internal channel, tag Elvis, Megan, Dave
Post Exec Rights indexing issues in internal channel. Tag Elvis, Megan, Dave. Mention 404 errors on article list pages
